_comment: Unified attribute definitions for JsonUI (Swift/Kotlin/React). Binding format: @{propertyName}

common._comment: Common attributes shared across all components

generatedBy.description: AI generation command that created this component (metadata only, not rendered)

partial.description: Marks this file as a partial/include template. Partials are not standalone views and will not generate Data models.

width.description: Width (number, 'matchParent', 'wrapContent') - binding supported. Not required if weight is specified.

height.description: Height (number, 'matchParent', 'wrapContent') - binding supported. Not required if weight is specified.

widthWeight.description: Width weight for flexible layouts (binding supported)

heightWeight.description: Height weight for flexible layouts (binding supported)

background.description: Background color - hex string (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) or color name from colors.json (can be data binding)

tapBackground.description: Background color when tapped - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

highlightBackground.description: Background color when highlighted - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

disabledBackground.description: Background when disabled - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

defaultBackground.description: Default background color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

borderColor.description: Border color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

borderStyle.description: Border line style - solid (default), dashed, or dotted

opacity.description: Opacity (0-1), alias for alpha - can be data binding

responsive.description: Size class overrides. Keys: compact, medium, regular, landscape, or hyphenated combos (e.g. regular-landscape). Values: object of attribute overrides for that size class.

visibility.description: View visibility state (can be data binding)

hidden.description: Whether component is hidden (can be data binding)

paddings.description: Padding as single value or [top, right, bottom, left]

rightPadding.description: Right padding (alias for paddingRight, binding supported)

leftPadding.description: Left padding (alias for paddingLeft, binding supported)

topPadding.description: Top padding (alias for paddingTop, binding supported)

bottomPadding.description: Bottom padding (alias for paddingBottom, binding supported)

margins.description: Margin as single value or [top, right, bottom, left]

centerInParent.description: Center both horizontally and vertically (binding supported)

alignLeftOfView.description: Align to right of specified view ID

alignRightOfView.description: Align to left of specified view ID

alignTopView.description: Align top edge with specified view

alignBottomView.description: Align bottom edge with specified view

alignLeftView.description: Align left edge with specified view

alignRightView.description: Align right edge with specified view

alignCenterVerticalView.description: Align vertical center with specified view

alignCenterHorizontalView.description: Align horizontal center with specified view

clipToBounds.description: Whether to clip content to bounds (binding supported)

onclick.description: Click handler function name (selector-based, lowercase) - string only, no binding

onLongPress.description: Long press gesture handler (camelCase) - binding only (@{functionName})

tintColor.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

include.description: Include another JSON layout (filename without extension)

binding_group.description: Groups related bindings for batch updates (can be array for multiple groups)

enabled.description: Whether component is enabled (can be data binding)

onAppear.description: Lifecycle callback when view appears (SwiftUI/Compose only)

onDisappear.description: Lifecycle callback when view disappears (SwiftUI/Compose only)

title.description: Dialog title (empty string if not specified)

actions.description: Binding to function returning action buttons (alternative to layout)

layout.description: Layout configuration for dialog content (alternative to actions)

data.description: Binding to data for the layout view

text.description: Text content (can be data binding, supports interpolation)

placeholder.description: Placeholder text when empty (alias for hint)

font.description: Font name or 'bold' (can be data binding)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json (can be data binding)

fontFamily.description: Font family name (e.g., 'Noto Sans JP'). Resolved via Configuration.Font.fontProvider or Font.custom(). Can coexist with font (weight) and fontSize.

lines.description: Maximum number of lines (0 for unlimited) (binding supported)

edgeInset.description: Edge insets as array or pipe-separated string

underline.description: Underline styling (boolean for simple, object for styled)

color.description: Underline color - hex string or color name from colors.json

strikethrough.description: Strikethrough styling (boolean for simple, object for styled)

color.description: Strikethrough color - hex string or color name from colors.json

minimumScaleFactor.description: Minimum scale factor for auto-shrink (binding supported)

hintColor.description: Hint text color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json

highlightColor.description: Font color when selected - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json

color.description: Underline color - hex string or color name from colors.json

range.description: Range [start, end], text pattern string, or binding expression

onclick.description: Click handler for this range (selector-based, lowercase)

onClick.description: Click handler for this range (camelCase) - binding only (@{functionName})

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json

hintColor.description: Placeholder color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

input.description: Input type (includes 'allphabet' typo for backward compatibility)

secure.description: Secure text entry for passwords (can be data binding)

accessoryBackground.description: Input accessory background - hex string or color name from colors.json

accessoryTextColor.description: Input accessory text color - hex string or color name from colors.json

tintColor.description: Cursor/caret color - hex string or color name from colors.json

caretAttributes.description: Caret styling attributes (fontColor for cursor color)

fontColor.description: Caret color - hex string or color name from colors.json

onShouldReturn.description: Should return event handler (return true to allow)

onShouldChangeCharacters.description: Should change characters event handler (return true to allow)

onShouldClear.description: Should clear event handler (return true to allow)

onShouldBeginEditing.description: Should begin editing event handler (return true to allow)

onShouldEndEditing.description: Should end editing event handler (return true to allow)

nextFocus.description: ID of the next field to focus on submit (for focus chain)

fontFamily.description: Font family name (e.g., Noto Sans JP). Resolved via Configuration.Font.fontProvider.

disabledBackground.description: Background color when disabled - hex string or color name from colors.json

hintColor.description: Placeholder color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

input.description: Input type (includes 'allphabet' typo for backward compatibility)

onShouldChangeText.description: Should change text event handler (return true to allow)

onShouldBeginEditing.description: Should begin editing event handler (return true to allow)

onShouldEndEditing.description: Should end editing event handler (return true to allow)

fontFamily.description: Font family name (e.g., Noto Sans JP). Resolved via Configuration.Font.fontProvider.

disabledBackground.description: Background color when disabled - hex string or color name from colors.json

EditText._comment: EditText is an alias for TextField. Maintained for Android compatibility.

hintColor.description: Placeholder color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

Input._comment: Input is an alias for TextField. Maintained for web compatibility.

hintColor.description: Placeholder color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

text.description: Button text (can be data binding, supports interpolation)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

disabledFontColor.description: Font color when disabled - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

highlightColor.description: Highlight color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

hilightColor.description: Highlight color - hex string or color name from colors.json (typo alias)

tapBackground.description: Background when tapped - hex string or color name from colors.json

highlightBackground.description: Background when highlighted - hex string or color name from colors.json

src.description: Image source name (can be data binding)

srcName.description: Image source name (alias, can be data binding)

url.description: Image URL (alias, can be data binding)

hintColor.description: Hint text color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

items.description: List of items for normal picker (can be template variable)

selectedIndex.description: Initial selected index for normal picker (two-way binding)

selectedDate.description: Initial selected date (yyyy-MM-dd format, two-way binding)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json
Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json

highlightColor.description: Highlight color - hex string or color name from colors.json

hintColor.description: Hint color - hex string or color name from colors.json

tintColor.description: Caret tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json

background.description: Caret background color - hex string or color name from colors.json
Divider color - hex string or color name from colors.json

onValueChanged.description: Value change handler (alias for onValueChange) - binding only (@{functionName})

colorScheme.description: Color scheme for native date picker icon visibility (set 'dark' for dark backgrounds)

Switch._comment: Switch is the primary component name. Toggle is supported as an alias for backward compatibility.

tint.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

tintColor.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (alias)

onTintColor.description: Track color when on - hex string or color name from colors.json

thumbTintColor.description: Thumb tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

offTintColor.description: Off tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json

Toggle._comment: Toggle is an alias for Switch. Maintained for backward compatibility. New code should use Switch.

tint.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

tintColor.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (alias)

onTintColor.description: Track color when on - hex string or color name from colors.json

thumbTintColor.description: Thumb tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

offTintColor.description: Off tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

fontColor.description: Font color - hex string or color name from colors.json

tintColor.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json

normalColor.description: Normal state color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

selectedColor.description: Selected state color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

tintColor.description: Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json
Tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json

progressTintColor.description: Progress portion color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

trackTintColor.description: Track portion color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

onDrop.description: Handler called when an item is dropped onto this view - @{handlerName}

onDragOver.description: Handler called while a dragged item hovers over this view - @{handlerName}

onDragEnter.description: Handler called when a dragged item enters this view - @{handlerName}

onDragLeave.description: Handler called when a dragged item leaves this view - @{handlerName}

scrollsToTop.description: Scroll to top on status bar tap

itemSpacing.description: Spacing between items (used for both grid spacing and list item spacing)

layout.description: Layout type (flow: wrapping layout, LeftAligned: left-aligned wrapping)

columnCount.description: Number of columns for CSS grid

scrollTo.description: PassthroughSubject<Int, Never> for programmatic scrolling to cell index

scrollAnchor.description: Anchor point for scroll target (default: bottom)

defaultScrollAnchor.description: Initial scroll position anchor (iOS 17+). Sets where the scroll view starts.

cellIdProperty.description: Cell data property key to use as unique ID for ForEach identity. When set, scrollTo uses String type instead of Int.

autoChangeTrackingId.description: When true (and cellIdProperty is set), the library auto-computes each cellId as '<primary>_<hash>' so differential updates work without a manual hashForCell helper. If cellIdProperty is missing, the build emits a warning and cells fall back to index-based identity.

reverseLayout.description: Reverse the layout direction of the Collection grid. When true, section order in the generated code is also reversed so that JSON definition order (index 0 first) matches the visual top-to-bottom order on iOS (which does not support reverseLayout). Compose's reverseLayout then flips the entire list so index 0 appears at the bottom.

onItemAppear.description: Called with the cell index (Int) when a cell appears on screen. Use for pagination by checking index against total count in ViewModel.

currentPage.description: Current page index for paging collections (binding supported)

onPageChanged.description: Called with the new page index (Int) when the user swipes to a different page

text.description: Radio label (alias, can be data binding)

fontColor.description: Text color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

spacing.description: Space between icon and text (binding supported)

CheckBox._comment: CheckBox is the primary component name. Check is supported as an alias for backward compatibility.

text.description: Checkbox label (alias, can be data binding)

fontColor.description: Text color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

spacing.description: Space between icon and text (binding supported)

Check._comment: Check is an alias for CheckBox. Maintained for backward compatibility. New code should use CheckBox.

label.description: Check label text (can be data binding)

text.description: Check label text alias (can be data binding)

fontColor.description: Text color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

spacing.description: Space between icon and text (binding supported)

color.description: Indicator color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

fontColor.description: Text color - hex string or color name from colors.json

selectedFontColor.description: Selected text color - hex string or color name from colors.json

url.description: Web page URL (can be data binding)

allow.description: Iframe allow attribute for feature policy

selectedIndex.description: Currently selected tab index (binding for two-way)

icon.description: Tab icon name (SF Symbol for iOS, drawable for Android)

selectedIcon.description: Icon when tab is selected (optional, defaults to icon)

iconType.description: Icon source type: 'system' for platform icons (SF Symbols/Material Icons), 'resource' for custom drawable/asset images

badge.description: Badge value (number or text, can be binding)

view.description: Layout file name to display for this tab (without extension)

tintColor.description: Selected tab tint color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

unselectedColor.description: Unselected tab color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

tabBarBackground.description: Tab bar background color - hex string or color name from colors.json (binding supported)

showLabels.description: Whether to show tab labels (default: true)
